title: Iron’s Spells: Spoken Sorcery
description: This is a mod that lets you cast spells through voice recognition!
body:
### This is an addon for Iron’s Spells ’n Spellbooks. It does not add any new items or gameplay content, but instead introduces a new way to cast spells: **voice recognition**.

With this addon installed, players can trigger corresponding spells by speaking their names aloud, creating a more immersive and interactive magic experience. Rather than relying only on hotkeys or manual selection, spellcasting becomes something you actively speak into existence.

The mod is designed for players who want a more immersive wizard-like playstyle, as well as for content creators, roleplayers, and anyone interested in trying a different way to interact with magic in Minecraft.

### Features

* **Voice-based spell casting** for Iron’s Spells ’n Spellbooks
* **No extra items or content clutter** — focused entirely on interaction enhancement
* **More immersive gameplay**, making spellcasting feel closer to spoken magic
* **Lightweight addon design**, built to work alongside the original mod rather than replace its systems

### How it improves the gameplay experience

* Makes spellcasting feel more natural and thematic
* Adds a unique hands-free casting method
* Enhances roleplay and immersion for magic-focused gameplay
* Provides a fresh way to experience existing spells without changing the core progression of the original mod

The mod requires some initial setup the first time it is launched. Please refer to the **link** below for detailed instructions and a usage tutorial.

[Github](https://github.com/yelle233/VoiceCastAddon)
